---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new project idea
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it worth doing?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is the proposed one
better?

## Affected day

If this is a change to a specific `DayXXX_*` folder, which one?
Leave blank for repo-wide changes.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, links to relevant docs, related issues.
